title: RBI announces OMO Purchase of Government of India Securities
description: On a review of the current liquidity and financial conditions, the Reserve Bank has decided to conduct OMO purchase auctions of Government of India securities for an aggregate amount of ₹1,00,000 crore in two tranches of ₹50,000 crore each, to be held on March 09, 2026, and March 13, 2026. 2. Accordingly, the Reserve Bank will purchase the following Government securities through a multi-security auction using the multiple price method on March 09, 2026: S. No. ISIN Security Date of M
